name: viva-qa-suite
description: Automated QA + UX audit suite for vivacareeracademy.com (Playwright).

scripts.audit: npm run test && node scripts/generate-summary.js && node scripts/generate-links-html.js
scripts.audit:ci: npm run test -- --reporter=list,json,html && node scripts/generate-summary.js && node scripts/generate-links-html.js
